Description: The reporting period (year and month) for which housing starts are recorded.
CDE_Justification: Core temporal dimension used in all trend analysis and regulatory reporting.
Business_Rules: Must follow YYYY-MM format; cannot be future-dated; must be within dataset range.

Description: Full name of the Canadian province or territory where housing starts occurred.
CDE_Justification: Primary geographic dimension. Required for all provincial reporting and policy decisions.
Business_Rules: Must match official Statistics Canada geographic names. Must have a corresponding GEO_CODE.
Transformation_Notes: Mapped from Statistics Canada standard geography codes.

Description: Standard two-letter abbreviation for Canadian province or territory.
Valid_Values: ON, BC, AB, QC, MB, SK, NS, NB, NL, PE, NT, YT, NU
Business_Rules: Must be a valid ISO 3166-2:CA code. Must correspond to GEO column value.

Description: Classification of the residential structure type for which housing starts are counted.
CDE_Justification: Drives housing affordability analysis, policy segmentation, and infrastructure planning.
Valid_Values: Single-Detached | Semi-Detached | Row House | Apartment - 5+ storeys | Apartment - Under 5 storeys
Business_Rules: Must be one of the 5 approved dwelling type categories. No free-text entries permitted.

Description: The intended ownership or rental market for which the housing unit is being constructed.
CDE_Justification: Key dimension for rental vs. ownership market analysis. Used in federal housing affordability reports.
Business_Rules: Must be one of 3 approved values. Condominium units may overlap with apartment dwelling types.

Description: The number of new residential units for which construction has begun during the reference period.
CDE_Justification: Primary KPI for housing supply measurement. Used in GDP reporting, policy assessment, and federal funding allocation.
Business_Rules: Must be >= 0. NULL permitted only when data is suppressed for confidentiality in small geographies. Cannot exceed 99,999 for a single province-month combination.
Source_System: CMHC Building Permit Registry + Municipal Survey
Transformation_Notes: Aggregated from permit-level data to province-month-dwelling type grain.

Description: Average market price in Canadian dollars for housing units started in the reference period, by province, dwelling type, and intended market.
CDE_Justification: Core affordability metric. Drives CMHC mortgage insurance eligibility thresholds and federal housing benefit calculations.
Business_Rules: Must be > 0. NULL permitted when price data is unavailable or suppressed. Cannot exceed $10M (business ceiling). Must be greater than HOUSING_STARTS value when both are populated.
Transformation_Notes: Averaged from individual transaction records. Inflation-adjusted using CPI reference year 2018.

Description: Name of the primary data collection program or survey that produced this record.
Valid_Values: CMHC Housing Market Survey | Administrative Data | Statistics Canada Census
Business_Rules: Must be populated. Used for lineage traceability.
Transformation_Notes: Populated during ETL from source system metadata.

Description: Name of the government agency responsible for collecting and reporting this data.
Valid_Values: Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation | Statistics Canada
Business_Rules: Must be one of the approved reporting agencies. Must be consistent with DATA_SOURCE.

Description: The date on which this record was last updated or revised in the source system.
Business_Rules: Must be >= REF_DATE. Cannot be a future date. Must be populated on every record.
Transformation_Notes: System-generated timestamp at time of data load.

Description: The methodology used to collect or estimate the data for this record.
Valid_Values: Direct Survey | Administrative Data | Modelled Estimate
Business_Rules: If populated, must be one of 3 approved values. Modelled Estimate records should be flagged in reporting.

Description: The level of geographic aggregation for this record.
Business_Rules: Must be one of approved geography type values. This dataset contains Province/Territory level only.

Description: The unit of measurement applied to the HOUSING_STARTS value.
Business_Rules: Must be 'Units' for this dataset. Must be consistent with SCALAR_FACTOR.

Description: Multiplier to be applied to the HOUSING_STARTS value to obtain the actual count.
Business_Rules: Must be 'units' for this dataset. Must be consistent with UOM.

Description: Quality status indicator for the record, following Statistics Canada standard notation.
Business_Rules: Blank = final data. E = estimated, use with caution. F = suppressed for confidentiality. Downstream consumers must filter on STATUS.
Transformation_Notes: Sourced directly from CMHC data release files.

Description: Number of decimal places recommended for displaying HOUSING_STARTS values.
Business_Rules: Must be '0' for integer housing start counts.
